title: lysimachia verna
intro: Lysimachia verna, also known as early spring or American vernal-wort, is a perennial herb native to North America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve digestive issues, making it a popular remedy for indigestion and bloating. The plant is rich in mucilages, which provide relief from inflammation and irritation, offering health benefits such as soothing sore throats and coughs, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Early spring is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations have been used for centuries to promote overall well-being and digestive health.
